title: showcase: update BotForgeX Laboratories in APPS.md
author: blueplaysgames3921

gist.headline: BotForgeX gets a tune-up
gist.blurb: BotForgeX Laboratories is looking sharper in our showcase. Now featuring multimodal skills and fresh links.
gist.summary: Updated the APPS.md entry for BotForgeX Laboratories to reflect current metadata and multimodal capabilities.
gist.impact: Users browsing the showcase will see accurate details about the app's Vision and TTS features.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy pixel art laboratory setting representing 'BotForgeX'. A robot is being assembled or tuned up. Polly the Bee is there assisting or observing the upgrades. Represents the app getting its documentation and metadata polished.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a high-tech but rustic laboratory with robot parts and glowing screens. The cute bee mascot is helping a small robot adjust a lime green (#ecf874) antenna. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm.
